text.title: embedded-scratchpad-field Decision Tree
text.summary: Pick the right scratchpad variant for the task.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the task require more than one reasoning hop AND is the model NOT a dedicated reasoning model?

branch.conclusion: Skip the scratchpad; the answer field alone is sufficient.
Use `reasoning: str` declared before the answer/confidence/decision fields.
Use `plan_steps: list[str]` declared before `next_action`; 3-7 items typical.
Use `evidence: list[str]` (1-5 quoted snippets) declared before `category`.
Use `scratchpad: str` declared before `summary` and `next_action`; cap to ~300 words.

text.example: q-needs-thinking → branch(true) → q-task-shape → branch(decision) → conclusion(r1-before-answer). Result: schema with `reasoning: str` first, `confidence` and `decision` after.
